mapper.sql: SELECT TM.MENU_ID AS MENU_ID , TM.MENU_NAME AS MENU_NAME , TM.MENU_PARENT_ID AS MENU_PARENT_ID , TM.USE_YN AS USE_YN , TM.CREATE_USER_ID AS CREATE_USER_ID , TM.UPDATE_USER_ID AS UPDATE_USER_ID , TM.CREATE_DATE AS CREATE_DATE , TM.UPDATE_DATE AS UPDATE_DATE
mapper.select:
FROM TB_MENU TM
ORDER BY TM.CREATE_DATE DESC

SELECT TM.MENU_ID AS MENU_ID , TM.MENU_NAME AS MENU_NAME , TM.MENU_PARENT_ID AS MENU_PARENT_ID , TM.MENU_URL AS MENU_URL , TM.USE_YN AS USE_YN , TM.CREATE_USER_ID AS CREATE_USER_ID , TM.UPDATE_USER_ID AS UPDATE_USER_ID , TM.CREATE_DATE AS CREATE_DATE , TM.UPDATE_DATE AS UPDATE_DATE FROM TB_MENU TM
AND TM.MENU_ID = #{vo.menuId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_MENU
MENU_PARENT_ID = #{vo.menuParentId},
MENU_NAME = #{vo.menuName},
MENU_URL = #{vo.menuUrl},
USE_YN = #{vo.useYn},
UPDATE_USER_ID = #{vo.updateUserId}, UPDATE_DATE = NOW()
WHERE MENU_ID = #{vo.menuId}
